title: Alarm Alarmset Model
description: Information about a specific alarm name of the device.

units.description: Expected unit configuration for the alarm

type.description: Expected data type for the alarm

writable.description: Indicates if this alarm is writable (else read-only)

baseline_value.description: Represents the expected baseline value of the alarm

baseline_state.description: Expected state when `baseline_value` is set as the `set_value` for this alarm the config message

range_min.description: Represents the lower bound of the error threshold for a alarm

range_max.description: Represents the upper bound of the error threshold for a alarm

unchanged_limit_sec.description: Represents the limit in seconds that a alarm can be unchanged for

cov_increment.description: Triggering threshold for partial cov update publishing

ref.description: Mapping for the alarm to an internal resource (e.g. BACnet object reference)
